item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly identifies the repeated local-repair spiral and brakes further prompt accumulation while allowing a bounded emergency. Turn 2 maintains the brake under pressure and the temporary concession includes all required elements: one-time emergency framing, no baseline lift/no ongoing piecemeal prompt practice, and a structural repair deadline of 3 working days after launch."}
